services.title: Whole House Generators

services.title: Landscape Lighting

services.title: Ceiling Fans & Fixtures
services.description: New installations and replacements. We handle the tricky spots other electricians won't touch.

services.title: Panel Upgrades

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.description: Electrical issues don't wait. Same-day service when your power goes out.

about.heading: Honest work, fair prices
about.body: We're a Toms River electrical team that shows up when we say we will. No ridiculous pricing, no runaround — just straight electrical work done right.

reviews.name: Tom G.
reviews.text: Used Kingdom Electric several times — whole house generator, landscape lighting, outlets. Always difficult to find an honest electrician that won't charge ridiculous money. Anthony delivers.

reviews.name: Daniel J.
reviews.text: Called this morning with an electrical issue. Stephanie was very nice, said someone could be out this afternoon. Nick arrived even sooner and fixed it quickly. Couldn't be happier.

reviews.name: Dorothy S.
reviews.text: Hired them for ceiling fans and light fixtures. Anthony came to inspect and estimate — specific and informative. They showed up exactly as promised.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Ocean County
service_areas.subheading: Local electrical service you can count on

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical work done right?
cta.body: Call the team Toms River trusts. Honest pricing, quality work, and we show up when promised.
